reviews.review_description: I like the game...but l don't know how to move....that's kinda frustrating...I've tried pressing buttons but it didn't work...I'll keep trying....but the game is lovely and wonderful...download it guys edit: hi, um l later found out l had to press a particular button to move, the games fun

reviews.review_title: I will use this on my channel! so cool!
reviews.review_description: This is such an amazing app I couldn't imagine a game like that

Overall wonderful tho it should have a tutorial on how to move in case new VR users go straight to this game. And sure yeah yeah you get to pick up and drop stuff and the glasses, cups and plates make noise when dropped, the glasses, cups and plates should have a break animation and more items as well and make them interactable like making tea in the tea kettle and letting the player see animation steam and pour it into the glasses and mugs, but overall still a good game
